tasks.label: g++ build active file
args: OUT="${workspaceFolder}/output/${relativeFileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/output/${relativeFileDirname}"; PIDS=$(lsof -t "$OUT" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill -9 $PIDS; fi; /usr/bin/g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -O0 -g3 "${file}" -o "$OUT"
tasks.detail: Build active C++ file with debug symbols

tasks.label: g++ run active file
args: OUT="${workspaceFolder}/output/${relativeFileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/output/${relativeFileDirname}"; PIDS=$(lsof -t "$OUT" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill -9 $PIDS; fi; /usr/bin/g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -O0 -g3 "${file}" -o "$OUT" && "$OUT"
